prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-DUALSHARPENER-RED Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool Pocket-sized Dual Ceramic Blade Sharpener Grooved Handle - Red Description: Keep your knives and blades sharp with the Universal Tool Pocket-sized Dual Ceramic Sharpener.

This sharpener features ceramic honing rods and a grooved handle for a secure grip. At only 2.25" wide, it'll easily fit inside your pocket, tool bag or box. The sharpener is constructed of durable polypropylene so you can count on it to get the job done. This is a must-have sharpener to keep on hand for all of your blades, knives, scissors, hand tools and more. Search Terms: knives blades scissors knife sharpener blade Features: - Universal Tool Dual Sharpener - Red Color - Pocket-sized: 2.24" x .8" x 2" - Ceramic Honing Rods Keep Blades Sharp - Handle with Embedded Groove for Secure Grip - Constructed of Durable Polypropylene === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool Pocket Dual Ceramic Blade Sharpener Red
